# Lavi Labs

Lavi Labs is the personal studio and consulting brand of Oren Lavi.

Oren works as a fractional Head of Marketing for growing companies that need sharper positioning, better lead generation, practical automation, and senior marketing direction without hiring a full-time executive.

Core pages:

- Homepage: https://lavilabs.com/
- Results: https://lavilabs.com/results.html
- Contact: https://lavilabs.com/contact.html
